description: Data dictionary for this day's collection. Read this first: each entry says what a file is, what it's for, its source and key columns. Check report.json for per-feed status before trusting a file.

tradingview.csv.description: Single-call snapshot of the screener universe (~366 NSE names, market cap >= Rs 20,000 cr): identity, price, volume, performance, volatility, technicals, valuation, profitability, dividends, analyst targets and TradingView ratings.
tradingview.csv.use_case: Broad-universe scan in one request; CI-friendly (not NSE IP-blocked). 108+ TradingView screener fields for deep first-pass ranking.

indices.csv.description: Broad-market index levels (NIFTY 50, BANK, NEXT 50, India VIX, SENSEX).
indices.csv.use_case: Market regime context; India VIX gauges volatility regime.

sectors.csv.description: Sectoral index levels (IT, PHARMA, AUTO, FMCG, METAL, etc.).

earnings.csv.description: TTM revenue / gross / operating / net income / EBITDA / EPS, with YoY and QoQ growth, latest fiscal period, and last/next earnings dates.
earnings.csv.use_case: Earnings momentum (growth) and event awareness around results.

fii.csv.description: Daily FII/FPI and DII cash-market buy/sell/net values.

block_deals.csv.description: Block deals: client, side, quantity and price.

options.csv.description: Index option-chain analytics for NIFTY/BANKNIFTY: total CE/PE OI, PCR, max pain and ATM IV for the nearest expiry.
options.csv.use_case: Index sentiment, support/resistance via max pain, volatility via IV.

oi_spurts.csv.description: Underlyings with notable open-interest build-up vs the recent average.
oi_spurts.csv.use_case: Detect fresh positioning/interest before it shows in price.

most_active_contracts.csv.description: Most-traded F&O contracts by volume (incl. strike, expiry, OI).
most_active_contracts.csv.use_case: Where derivatives liquidity and attention are concentrated.

most_active_underlying.csv.description: Fut+opt volume and turnover per underlying.
most_active_underlying.csv.use_case: Rank names by derivatives activity / participation.

corporate_actions.csv.description: Dividends, splits, bonuses, buybacks and rights with ex/record dates.
corporate_actions.csv.use_case: Event setups and correct interpretation of price moves around adjustments.

macro.csv.description: Macro & global factors: USDINR, gold/silver, crude (WTI/Brent), copper, nat gas, DXY, Bitcoin; US markets (S&P/Nasdaq/Dow), US VIX, US 5/10/30Y yields; Asia (Nikkei, Hang Seng, Shanghai, Kospi, Taiwan, ASX); Europe (FTSE, DAX, Euro Stoxx 50); EM & India ETFs (EEM, INDA); repo/CPI/GDP placeholders pending RBI/MOSPI feeds.
macro.csv.use_case: Top-down macro and global-cue context (pre-open Asia/Europe, US risk gauge).

delivery.csv.description: Security-wise delivery %, volume and turnover for the universe from the latest available bhavcopy.
delivery.csv.use_case: Separate genuine accumulation (high delivery) from intraday churn; swing-trade quality filter.

relative_strength.csv.description: Stock performance vs NIFTY 50 and mapped NIFTY sector index (1w/1m).
relative_strength.csv.use_case: Leadership filter for swing trades — prefer RS leaders.

event_risk.csv.description: Earnings, corp-action and news flags inside a 21-day event window.
event_risk.csv.use_case: Avoid holding into results/ex-dates for 2–3 week swings.

fno_momentum.csv.description: Names with F&O OI buildup and derivatives activity scores.
fno_momentum.csv.use_case: Confirm swing/intraday interest via derivatives positioning.

swing_candidates.csv.description: Top ~20 names scored for 2–3 week swing holds targeting ~5% — trend, RS, delivery, F&O, upside room, event-risk penalties. NOT a recommendation.
swing_candidates.csv.use_case: Focused swing shortlist for the research engine.

stock_analysis.csv.description: PRIMARY FILE — one row per stock merging trend, momentum, volume, fundamentals, earnings, relative strength, F&O and event flags, with deterministic sub-scores, classic pivots/support/resistance, ATR-based trade levels, and a cross-sectional FACTOR MODEL (winsorized z-scores for value/momentum/quality/low-vol/growth/size + composite_factor_z and its universe percentile rank, Barra/AQR-style). Blank columns (supertrend, ichimoku, obv, cmf, ownership, news sentiment, surprises) have no source yet. NOT a recommendation.
stock_analysis.csv.use_case: The main file the research engine reads; everything deterministic precomputed. Factor z-scores rank each name vs the universe (mean 0, higher = better).

market_summary.csv.description: One-row market regime: Nifty/BankNifty trend, India VIX & level, best/worst sector, FII/DII net, crude, USDINR — plus a GLOBAL block (US S&P/Dow %, US VIX, DXY, US 10Y, Asia & Europe cues, risk-on/off).
market_summary.csv.use_case: Top-down domestic + global context in one row — no need to infer market state from many files.

watchlist.csv.description: Simple trend/momentum ranking (above SMA200, TV tech rating, RSI, ADX) — a starting cut, NOT a recommendation.
watchlist.csv.use_case: First-pass shortlist for the research engine to investigate.

report.json.description: Run summary: per-agent status (ok/partial/error), rows and timing.
report.json.use_case: Data-quality gate — know which feeds are trustworthy this run.
